mapper.select: SELECT CD AS SCHDL_SE_CD, CD_NM AS SCHDL_SE_NM FROM cmn_cd WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'CAL_SCHDL_SE_CD' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND CD IN ('VAC', 'BIZTRIP', 'OUTSIDE', 'MEETING', 'ETC') ORDER BY SORT_SEQ, CD

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DT.CAL_YMD, '%Y-%m-%d') AS BGNG_DT, S.SCHDL_SE_CD, CASE WHEN S.SCHDL_SE_CD = 'VAC' THEN 'leave' WHEN S.SCHDL_SE_CD IN ('BIZTRIP','OUTSIDE') THEN 'trip' WHEN S.SCHDL_SE_CD = 'MEETING' THEN 'meeting' ELSE 'etc' END AS COLOR_TYPE, COUNT(*) AS TARGET_CNT FROM schdl_info S JOIN ( SELECT DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(#{monthStartYmd}, '%Y-%m-%d'), INTERVAL seq DAY) AS CAL_YMD FROM ( SELECT 0 seq UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9 UNION ALL SELECT 10 UNION ALL SELECT 11 UNION ALL SELECT 12 UNION ALL SELECT 13 UNION ALL SELECT 14 UNION ALL SELECT 15 UNION ALL SELECT 16 UNION ALL SELECT 17 UNION ALL SELECT 18 UNION ALL SELECT 19 UNION ALL SELECT 20 UNION ALL SELECT 21 UNION ALL SELECT 22 UNION ALL SELECT 23 UNION ALL SELECT 24 UNION ALL SELECT 25 UNION ALL SELECT 26 UNION ALL SELECT 27 UNION ALL SELECT 28 UNION ALL SELECT 29 UNION ALL SELECT 30 ) N WHERE DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(#{monthStartYmd}, '%Y-%m-%d'), INTERVAL seq DAY) <= STR_TO_DATE(#{monthEndYmd}, '%Y-%m-%d') ) DT ON DT.CAL_YMD BETWEEN DATE(S.BGNG_DT) AND DATE(S.END_DT) WHERE AND DATE(S.BGNG_DT) <= STR_TO_DATE(#{monthEndYmd}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE(S.END_DT) >= STR_TO_DATE(#{monthStartYmd}, '%Y-%m-%d') GROUP BY DT.CAL_YMD, S.SCHDL_SE_CD, COLOR_TYPE ORDER BY DT.CAL_YMD, FIELD(COLOR_TYPE, 'leave', 'trip', 'meeting', 'etc')

SELECT S.SCHDL_SN, S.CO_ID, S.SCHDL_SE_CD, C.CD_NM AS SCHDL_SE_NM, S.SCHDL_NM, DATE_FORMAT(S.BGNG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS BGNG_DT, DATE_FORMAT(S.END_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS END_DT, S.ALL_DAY_YN, S.PLACE_NM, S.SCHDL_CN, GROUP_CONCAT(U.USER_ID ORDER BY U.USER_NM SEPARATOR ',') AS TARGET_USER_IDS, GROUP_CONCAT(U.USER_NM ORDER BY U.USER_NM SEPARATOR ', ') AS TARGET_USER_NMS, COUNT(U.USER_ID) AS TARGET_CNT, CASE WHEN S.SCHDL_SE_CD = 'VAC' THEN 'leave' WHEN S.SCHDL_SE_CD IN ('BIZTRIP','OUTSIDE') THEN 'trip' WHEN S.SCHDL_SE_CD = 'MEETING' THEN 'meeting' ELSE 'etc' END AS COLOR_TYPE FROM schdl_info S LEFT JOIN cmn_cd C ON C.CD_GROUP_ID = 'CAL_SCHDL_SE_CD' AND C.CD = S.SCHDL_SE_CD LEFT JOIN schdl_user_rel R ON R.SCHDL_SN = S.SCHDL_SN LEFT JOIN user_info U ON U.USER_ID = R.USER_ID WHERE AND DATE(S.BGNG_DT) <= STR_TO_DATE(#{selectedYmd}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE(S.END_DT) >= STR_TO_DATE(#{selectedYmd}, '%Y-%m-%d') GROUP BY S.SCHDL_SN ORDER BY S.ALL_DAY_YN DESC, S.BGNG_DT, S.SCHDL_SN

SELECT S.SCHDL_SN, S.CO_ID, S.SCHDL_SE_CD, C.CD_NM AS SCHDL_SE_NM, S.SCHDL_NM, DATE_FORMAT(S.BGNG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS BGNG_DT, DATE_FORMAT(S.END_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS END_DT, S.ALL_DAY_YN, S.PLACE_NM, S.SCHDL_CN, GROUP_CONCAT(U.USER_ID ORDER BY U.USER_NM SEPARATOR ',') AS TARGET_USER_IDS, GROUP_CONCAT(U.USER_NM ORDER BY U.USER_NM SEPARATOR ', ') AS TARGET_USER_NMS FROM schdl_info S LEFT JOIN cmn_cd C ON C.CD_GROUP_ID = 'CAL_SCHDL_SE_CD' AND C.CD = S.SCHDL_SE_CD LEFT JOIN schdl_user_rel R ON R.SCHDL_SN = S.SCHDL_SN LEFT JOIN user_info U ON U.USER_ID = R.USER_ID WHERE S.SCHDL_SN = #{schdlSn} AND S.CO_ID = #{coId} AND S.USE_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY S.SCHDL_SN
mapper.update: UPDATE schdl_info SET SCHDL_SE_CD = #{schdlSeCd}, SCHDL_NM = #{schdlNm}, BGNG_DT = #{bgngDt}, END_DT = #{endDt}, ALL_DAY_YN = IFNULL(#{allDayYn}, 'N'), PLACE_NM = #{placeNm}, SCHDL_CN = #{schdlCn}, MDFCN_DT = NOW(), MDFR_ID = #{mdfrId} WHERE SCHDL_SN = #{schdlSn} AND CO_ID = #{coId} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
